title: Gate 3 erlang BIFs — element, send, make_ref, spawn/1, type queries
purpose: gleam_erlang and gleam_otp import erlang BIFs beyond Gate 1+2. This brief registers element/2, send/2, make_ref/0, spawn/1, spawn_link/1, is_process_alive/1, and tuple_size/1 as Gate 3 BIFs.
task: Implement 7 BIFs in gate3_bifs.rs and register via register_gate3_bifs().
boundaries: This brief SHALL NOT implement spawn_monitor/1 or spawn_opt/2
This brief SHALL NOT implement send/3 (with options)
This brief SHALL NOT implement setelement/3

requirements.title: erlang:element/2
requirements.spec: erlang:element/2 SHALL accept (Index, Tuple) with 1-based indexing. Return element or badarg.

requirements.title: erlang:send/2 and erlang:tuple_size/1
requirements.spec: send/2 delivers message to target mailbox returning Message. tuple_size/1 returns tuple arity.
acceptance: send(Pid, msg) delivers and returns msg
send to nonexistent pid returns msg (no crash)

requirements.title: erlang:make_ref/0, is_process_alive/1, spawn/1, spawn_link/1
requirements.spec: make_ref returns unique reference. is_process_alive checks process table. spawn/1 and spawn_link/1 accept zero-arity fun (MFA export only for now).
acceptance: spawn(fun m:f/0) spawns and returns pid
